zh.Silkstone, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾希爾可斯同
zh.Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾宏比 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam de Montbegon於大約1140年出生在英國藍卡爾宏比 卡素時，他的父親Roger de Montbegon III52歲，母親Mabel17歲。他和Matilda FitzSwain至少有1個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於大約1181年在英國英格蘭越可爾希爾可斯同享年43歲。

zh-hans.Silkstone, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾希爾可斯同
zh-hans.Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾宏比 卡素
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam de Montbegon于大约1140年出生在英国藍卡爾宏比 卡素时，他的父亲Roger de Montbegon III52岁，母亲Mabel17岁。他和Matilda FitzSwain至少有1个儿子和5个女儿。他去世于大约1181年在英国英格兰越可爾希爾可斯同享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam de Montbegon was born about 1140, in Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England, his father, Roger de Montbegon III, was 52 and his mother, Mabel, was 17. He had at least 1 son and 5 daughters with Matilda FitzSwain. He died about 1181, in Silkstone, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam de Montbegon est né environ 1140, à Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Montbegon III, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Mabel, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles avec Matilda FitzSwain. Il est décédé environ 1181, à Silkstone, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam de Montbegon um 1140 in Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Montbegon III 52 und seine Mutter Mabel 17. Er hatte mit Matilda FitzSwain mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Er starb um 1181 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Silkstone, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Montbegon è nato il circa 1140 nel Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Roger de Montbegon III, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Mabel, aveva 17 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie con Matilda FitzSwain. Morì circa 1181, nel Silkstone, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam de Montbegonが約1140年にイギリスランカシュアイアホールンビー カストルで生まれた時，父Roger de Montbegon IIIは52歳，母Mabelは17歳であった。彼はMatilda FitzSwainとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1181年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアシルクストーンで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam de Montbegon(이)가 대략 1140년 영국 랭카실르 호른비 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Montbegon III(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Mabel(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Matilda FitzSwain(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1181년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 시크스톤에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1140–Abt 1181: tany ho any amin'ny 1140–tany ho any amin'ny 1181

mn.Silkstone, Yorkshire, England: Silkstone, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Montbegon nasceu aproximadamente 1140, em Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Montbegon III, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Mabel, tinha 17 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas com Matilda FitzSwain. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1181, em Silkstone, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam de Montbegon родился около 1140 г. в местности хаурнби кастл, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger de Montbegon III было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Mabel, 17. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей от Matilda FitzSwain. Он умер около 1181 г. в местности силкстоун, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam de Montbegon nació aproximadamente 1140, en Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger de Montbegon III, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Mabel, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas con Matilda FitzSwain. Murió aproximadamente 1181, en Silkstone, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 43 años.
